title: Rotary Washing Line Cover Waterproof - Universal Fit with Zip and Drawstring to Tighten - Weather Resistant and Great Protection Parasol Cover for Garden Dryer and Airer (Green)
features: UNMATCHED PROTECTION: Flatro (Universal fit: 165 x 14 x 14 cm approximately) rotary washing line cover is an amazing clothes line prop as it helps to get protected from Dust, Rain, UV Protection and all other weather conditions
HEAVY DUTY FABRIC: The fabric of this cover is strong, durable, long-lasting and hard-wearing for outdoor airer protections
BEST RESISTANT: Flatro washing line cover has ability to resist weather, rust and rot to reach the rotary airer at all
VERSATILITY: Flatro washing line cover can also be used as small Parasol cover
USAGE: Flatro waterproof washing line cover is very easy to fit and remove zip closure comes with the draw string

Why do I need a rotary cover? It helps keep your rotary line clean and safe from weather damage. How do I use the rotary cover? Simply place it over the rotary line and secure it with the zip and drawstring. Will it fit my rotary line? The adjustable drawstring makes it suitable for most rotary lines. Can it handle strong winds? The secure fit helps it stay in place during windy days. Is the cover easy to remove? Yes, it can be removed quickly with the zip closure.
